name: orchestrated-delivery
description: Delivery Loop for scoped execution, verification/testing, review, handoff, and user acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Run complex goals through acceptance, tests, review, and handoff.
interface.longDescription: Keeps complex goals scoped, sliced, tested, reviewed, and mapped to user acceptance. Includes optional Codex thread coordination for user-visible lanes or isolated work.
defaultPrompt: Drive this goal through alignment, acceptance, execution slices, verification/testing, review, handoff when needed, and user acceptance.
Use $grill-with-docs when the goal, design, domain language, or tradeoffs need sharper questioning.
Use $codex-thread-manager to inspect, coordinate, and organize Codex threads for this goal.
